title: three-mmd-loader fixture inventory
description: Inventory of fixture files used by three-mmd-loader smoke checks.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI for editor tooling.

basePath.description: Base directory for fixture entries, resolved relative to the directory containing this JSON file.

pmx.description: PMX fixture paths keyed by arbitrary names such as pmx001 or oneBoneCube.

pmd.description: PMD fixture paths keyed by arbitrary names such as pmd001.

vmd.description: VMD fixture paths keyed by arbitrary names such as vmd001 or walkMotion.

vpd.description: VPD fixture paths keyed by arbitrary names such as vpd001.

description.description: Optional human-readable notes about the inventory.

relativeFilePath.description: A file path resolved from basePath. Relative paths are recommended for portable inventories.

fixtureMap.description: Map of arbitrary fixture keys to file paths.
